title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: nmstate bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for nmstate is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Nmstate is a library with an accompanying command line tool that manages host networking settings in a declarative manner and aimed to satisfy enterprise needs to manage host networking through a northbound declarative API and multi provider support on the southbound.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [FR] Request to Add Support for Sending Left Certificate(leftsendcert) in X.509-Based VPN Authentication [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110634)  [RFE] Add alt-names to network interfaces [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110778)  Support per-interface IPv4 forwarding via sysctl in nmstate [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110787)  nmstate fails in systems with NetworkManager-wait-online timeout [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-116450)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
full_text:
An update for nmstate is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Nmstate is a library with an accompanying command line tool that manages host networking settings in a declarative manner and aimed to satisfy enterprise needs to manage host networking through a northbound declarative API and multi provider support on the southbound.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [FR] Request to Add Support for Sending Left Certificate(leftsendcert) in X.509-Based VPN Authentication [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110634)  [RFE] Add alt-names to network interfaces [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110778)  Support per-interface IPv4 forwarding via sysctl in nmstate [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110787)  nmstate fails in systems with NetworkManager-wait-online timeout [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-116450)
